nft_items.description: PixelPunk with VR headset and hoodie, common but popular traits.

nft_items.description: A mid-series CyberWhale with rare violet glow.

nft_items.name: Sword of Shards
nft_items.description: ERC-1155 game item sword with crystal shards on the blade.

nft_items.name: Aegis Shield
nft_items.description: Sturdy shield favored by high-level players.

nft_items.name: Potion of Swiftness
nft_items.description: Consumable item that boosts speed for a short duration.

nft_items.name: Dragon Emblem
nft_items.description: Badge item showing completion of the dragon raid.

nft_collections.name: PixelPunks
nft_collections.description: A 10,000-piece pixel art avatar collection inspired by classic 8-bit games and on-chain culture. Traits include neon hairstyles, VR headsets, and retro accessories, with an active secondary market and mid-range floor price.

nft_collections.name: CyberWhales
nft_collections.description: A limited series of 1,000 cybernetic whale NFTs roaming luminous digital oceans. High-end artwork with rare glowing and holographic traits, frequently used as profile pictures by DeFi whales.

nft_collections.name: On-Chain Game Items
nft_collections.description: An evolving ERC-1155 collection of in-game assets such as weapons, shields, consumables, and achievement badges used across multiple blockchain games. High item count and an accessible floor suitable for new players.
